name: Ukyo Tachibana

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE HAZY BLADE
skills.description: Every 5–4s, Ukyo Tachibana gains one enhanced Basic Attack that has increased range, restores Health, deals extra damage, and slows enemies. Dealing skill damage shortens the enhanced Basic Attack's cooldown.

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE SWALLOW SWIPE
skills.description: Ukyo Tachibana creates a domain around himself, then leaps backward, dealing damage to enemies in his path. This skill can be used again after 2s, or immediately if it hits a target. If he returns to the starting point of phase 1 after using phase 2, phase 2 is enhanced.

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE HEAVENLY HACK
skills.description: Slashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range. Enemies at the edge of the skill's range will be stunned.

skills.name: CONCEALED SABRE SNOWFALL SLASH
skills.description: Slashes 4 times in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range. Recovers Health each time damage is dealt.

tips: Ukyo Tachibana (Assassin): Tier B on international ranked — 51.31% WR.

faqs.answer: Ukyo Tachibana is Tier B Assassin with 51.31% win rate, 0.38% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).
